messages.content: Build a compact profile card. Available slots: :profile.name, :profile.role.

gold_openui:
root = Stack([name, role], "column")
name = TextContent(":profile.name")
role = TextContent(":profile.role")

messages.content: Build a simple alert. Available slots: :alert.title, :alert.body.

gold_openui:
root = Stack([title, body], "column")
title = TextContent(":alert.title")
body = TextContent(":alert.body")
